block_17: Most Profitable Trade of the Week
block_43: Every four years, the number of BTC entering circulation through mining reduces by half. This process is known as halving. While the first Bitcoin halving (from 50 to 25 BTC) took place in 2012, the most recent one occurred in 2020. According to simple arithmetic, the last Bitcoin is expected to be mined by the year 2140 approx.
